## Map name

## Workshop ID or link

<!-- Steam Workshop URL or ID for the CS2 version of the map. -->
<!-- If the map isn't on the Workshop yet, note that here. -->

## Difficulty (your assessment)

<!-- Easy / Medium / Hard / Insane : your honest read. -->

## Why document this map?

<!-- Is it popular? A common newcomer stumbling block? A staff pick? -->
<!-- A sentence or two is fine. -->

## Would you write the guide yourself?

<!-- Yes / No / Maybe : no pressure either way. -->
